summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quasar Apps website after removal of fake data. All backend APIs working correctly (8/8 tests passed). Frontend displays real data correctly: myCSA.app as sole featured project with live site link, 2 co-founders (Martin Osorio & Christiana Bowen), updated stats, and founder quotes in philosophy section. Contact form functional with success confirmation.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation buttons (next/prev) don't visually change quotes when clicked, though 2 pagination dots are present indicating 2 testimonials exist

passed_tests: Backend: Get all case studies - returns myCSA.app (200)
Backend: Get case study by slug 'mycsa-app' (200)
Frontend: About section displays correct stats (1 Live Product, 2 Co-Founders, UX Led Approach, 100% Committed)
Frontend: Featured Project section shows myCSA.app with 'Visit mycsa.app' button linking to https://mycsa.app
Frontend: Team section shows exactly 2 founders (Martin Osorio - Tech Lead, Christiana Bowen - UX Lead)
Frontend: Philosophy section displays 'Our Philosophy' title with founder quotes
Frontend: Case study detail page loads correctly for mycsa-app with all content (client, industry, services, challenge, solution, results, technologies, testimonial)
Frontend: Contact form accepts input and submits successfully with success message 'Message sent successfully! We'll be in touch soon.'

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (1 minor UI issue with testimonial navigation)

action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Fix testimonial carousel navigation - next/prev buttons should cycle between Martin Osorio's and Christiana Bowen's quotes. The quotes are present but navigation doesn't visually update the displayed quote. This is a LOW priority cosmetic issue.
